# Store Distribution Architecture: Windows MSIX Runtime

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/storedistributiondocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to architecture](../architecture.md)

| Channel | Runtime shape | Background rule | IPC/data root | Update |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `msix-sideload` | msix-packaged-helper-broker | explicit-consent | windows-named-pipe / windows-package-local-data | self-managed |
| `msix-store` | msix-packaged-full-trust-helper-tray | explicit-consent-and-store-review | windows-named-pipe / windows-package-local-data | store-managed |

Common rules:

- Provider CLIs are not included in the MSIX package.
- Local IPC uses Windows named pipe only.
- App data and daemon state live under package local data root.
- Workspace access reaches runtime only through user folder grant and C11 consent.
